label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked inside final kilometer on 20% ramps at Valdepenas, gapped MASS Enric and field for stage win despite depleted team support.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC called SEPP Kuss for lead-out despite prior day crash, showing aggressive intent even without full team strength.
MASS Enric attacked before ROGLIC on final wall but lacked punch to hold 20%+ gradients against superior explosive power.
VAN BAARLE Dylan paced LOPEZ Miguel Angel to finale, revealing Movistar prioritizing positioning over early attacks on short stages.
NIELSEN Magnus Cort held 30-second gap until 4km but collapsed on 20% wall, showing sustained climbing inadequate without final kick.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: second stage win post-crash demonstrates recovery and superiority on explosive finishes over sustained climbers
rider_signals.MASS Enric: neutral: initiated final wall attack but gapped by ROGLIC, lacks explosive power for super-steep ramps despite strong positioning
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: third place with VAN BAARLE support suggests Movistar has dual-leader capability on punchy finishes
rider_signals.NIELSEN Magnus Cort: negative: 30-second advantage with 4km remaining evaporated on 20% gradients, exposing weakness on explosive walls versus breakaway tempo
rider_signals.HAGUE Jack: positive: fourth place from reduced bunch indicates consistency on steep finishes without specific team support
